title: Realms Minigame Search
description: Adds a search bar into the realms minigame selection screen
body:
Adds a search bar into the Realms Minigame selection screen.


**Usage:**

Just type in your search into the search bar and the realms minigame selection screen will only show the maps that fit your search criteria.

With a normal search (Example: "parkour") the search will be done by title, and it will show all the maps that contain those characters, additionally if you add a '@' at the start of your search (Example: "@yeggs") the search will instead be done by the minigame's creator name.


If you find any bugs or have some feedback, feel free to message me at _jedewqa@gmail.com_ or on Discord _sac11221_.

You can find the source code [here](https://github.com/sac11221/fabric-realms-search-1.20).
